title: eupatorium cannabinum var. heterophyllum
intro: Eupatorium cannabinum var. heterophyllum, also known as hemp agrimony, is a variety of the eupatorium cannabinum plant, a flowering plant in the aster family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of hemp agrimony include relieving digestive issues, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory problems, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Hemp agrimony can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, allowing for easy incorporation into a holistic health regimen.
